/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang --target=aarch64-none-linux-android24 --sysroot=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot -fPIC -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security  -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG  -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments  -Wl,--gc-sections  -shared -Wl,-soname,libwebpdecoder.so -o libwebpdecoder.so CMakeFiles/webpdecode.dir/src/dec/alpha_dec.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdecode.dir/src/dec/buffer_dec.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdecode.dir/src/dec/frame_dec.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdecode.dir/src/dec/idec_dec.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdecode.dir/src/dec/io_dec.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdecode.dir/src/dec/webp_dec.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdspdecode.dir/src/dsp/alpha_processing.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdspdecode.dir/src/dsp/cpu.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdspdecode.dir/src/dsp/dec.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdspdecode.dir/src/dsp/dec_clip_tables.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdspdecode.dir/src/dsp/filters.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdspdecode.dir/src/dsp/lossless.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdspdecode.dir/src/dsp/rescaler.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdspdecode.dir/src/dsp/upsampling.c.o CMakeFiles/webpdspdecode.dir/src/dsp/yuv.c.o
